notes: This is the Campsite schedule (scheduleId -2147483453); reservableDates trimmed to the 2026 season, minStayOverrides trimmed to 3 representative 2022 entries out of 16 total (shape only — none fall in the 2026 season), maxStayOverrides is genuinely empty for every park probed (BC Parks doesn't appear to use it), allowedArrivalDepartureDays kept in full for 2026 (8 entries).

Live cross-check: querying /api/availability/map for this resource, Thu 2026-10-08 arrival / Sat 2026-10-10 departure (2 nights, 1 Tent — the exact THR-133 repro), returned 54 of 439 sites at site-day code 3 ['Restrictions', 3,3,3] — matching the allowedArrivalDepartureDays entry below for 2026-10-09..2026-10-12 (daysOfWeek [1,5] = Mon/Fri): the requested Sat departure isn't allowed for that period.

daysOfWeek uses .NET System.DayOfWeek (Sunday=0..Saturday=6), confirmed by this exact match: [1,5] = Monday, Friday, and the site's own banner for this stay reads 'must depart on any of the following days: Monday, Friday'.
